title: centaurea × dioszegiana
intro: Centaurea × dioszegiana is a rare hybrid plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family, resulting from the cross between Centaurea cyanus and Centaurea vallesiaca. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Centaurea × dioszegiana include reducing fever, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
